summary: Made two surgical seam edits: the opening now carries forward Lena's overnight evidence-building from Chapter 11, and the closing line lands the ride back on her block to set up the strained silence referenced at the start of Chapter 13.
edits: Adjusted the opening paragraph to link Lena's next-morning trip to the records and screenshots she built at the end of Chapter 11.
Refined the final line so the return to Lena's block hands off more cleanly into Chapter 13's several-days-later silence.
